empty.title: No Themes
empty.description: Click the "Import Theme" button to add a new theme

processFilter.label: Process Filter
processFilter.hint: Enter one application name per line, use * to listen to all applications. Case-insensitive.

showConsole.label: Show Console
showConsole.hint: Takes effect after restarting the app

theme.invalidFormat: Please select a ZIP format theme file
theme.missingRootFolder: This theme is invalid: The archive must contain exactly one root folder!
theme.missingThemeToml: This theme is invalid: Missing theme.toml file in the root folder!
theme.missingConfigSection: This theme is invalid: theme.toml is missing the [smtc2web.theme] configuration section!
theme.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the theme "{name}"?
